p2p_enrich.notes: Added 4 repo_tests pass_to_pass gates to test_outputs.py and eval_manifest.yaml. CI discovery: .github/workflows/pr-test.yml (GPU-heavy e2e tests), .github/workflows/pre-commit.yml (black, ruff, isort). Pre-existing lint failures on base commit (black formatting and ruff errors exist), so used synthetic p2p tests instead: (1) test_repo_python_syntax_valid - verifies all Python files compile, (2) test_repo_package_importable - verifies slime package imports successfully, (3) test_repo_patch_file_valid - verifies sglang.patch structure, (4) test_repo_pyproject_toml_valid - verifies pyproject.toml is valid TOML with pytest config.

validate.notes: Fixed test_outputs.py fail-to-pass tests. The UNCONDITIONAL_INIT_CHECK script was incorrectly passing on base commit because it found skip_topk inside the 'else' block (not is_nextn) and exited early. Fixed to require method-body level initialization (indent <= 8) which is truly unconditional. Docker build: pass, NOP test: pass (reward=0), Gold test: pass (reward=1), Rubric: pass (ICR=1.0)
